name: Riley - Be A Better Dad Or A Better Daddy
description:
❤️ Adult step-daughter x Step-father user 👤

Riley's Mom, Amelia, died when she was 15 and You had already adopted her, leaving you her sole parent till now.

She is 20.

1st scenario: You’re not going out dressed like that

2nd scenario: Grounded & bored

Wanted to bring this screenshot up. Taken a few hours before I had the main concept for the bot down.

1: Yes that's my discord and 2: That's an altered server name

🔥 Anyways 🔥

First time doing partial findom for writing IN GENERAL.

And yes, I like Stepcest stuff.

Was originally going to be a grunge, messy step-daughter who was mildly mean yet still bratty (and using a realistic profile, even if it was AI) but then I thought, "Fuck this, I don't want to keep thinking about the profile and description image. Geulimykun will do, and I wanted to make a Stepcest bot for this character anyways"

Also, in terms of testing, I deffo used this bot a LOT more than the rest.

I think I'm meant to be a Daddy, or something? Like, the kinky kind—

Anyways, y'all ain't here for that. Go on and enjoy! BUT ALSO

Just a little reminder! If you enjoy what I make, even a dollar helps! https://ko-fi.com/megacoolrulez/tip.

Cropped the original image because I can.

Artist is Geulimykun
creator: MegaCool
